# Vektas positioning update

This branch repositions Vektas for mid-market and enterprise buyers.

## Core positioning

Vektas is a boutique AI and software engineering consultancy that helps organizations modernize complex workflows, integrate disconnected systems, and deploy practical AI systems into production.

## Messaging principles

- Lead with business and operational problems rather than technology categories.
- Use AI where reasoning and adaptation add value.
- Prefer deterministic software, APIs, rules, and conventional engineering where reliability, repeatability, cost, and auditability matter.
- Avoid unsupported customer claims, invented case studies, or fabricated results.
- Present engagements as assessment, pilot, production implementation, and optimization/support.
- Target CIOs, CTOs, IT leaders, operations leaders, transformation teams, and business-unit executives.
